name: procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed discounts and late payments. We provide a dashboard instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and analyzing procurement spend effectively.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking and analyzing procurement spend effectively.
